projects.title: Bukal Online Pubmats
projects.description: A full masthead-to-margins overhaul of the school paper's layout system & Social Media Publication Material.

projects.title: The Marine Eye
projects.description: Our Senior Highschool Robotics Research Project which I headed. It's a Fish-sonar sensor, as well as a camera display for underwater marine activities.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description: A Terminal based software using Java to keep track of expenses. This uses my Intermediate programming skills I learned during my First Year as a BSIT student.

achievements.title: National Aralinks ShowcACE Best Presenter / Storyteller
achievements.description: Our group placed as a national winner during the Aralinks ShowcACE and won a special award for being the best to present our project, with me as the Lead Presenter 5 consecutive times. In addition, I represented Luzon in the national competition in Cebu.

achievements.title: Chief Graphics Designer, School Publication
achievements.description: Led the visual direction of the school paper for two years, overseeing layout, typography, and design consistency across every issue.

achievements.title: Divisional, Regional, & National Schools Press Conference Qualifier
achievements.description: Advanced through competition rounds in Desktop Publishing, earning the qualification that led to the national stage.
